newsSince: No material company-specific news distinct from the broader advanced-packaging cycle since June 9; the move appears flow/sector-driven. (Note: feeds frequently conflate this small-cap ticker with TOWA 6315.) Thesis as an OSAT/packaging name tied to HBM/chiplet capacity is unchanged.

sources.label: Advanced-packaging / HBM packaging context (TrendForce memory wall)

verdicts.rankRationale: OSAT/advanced-packaging relevance to HBM/chiplet capacity is intact, but a +34.7% move since June 9 and 131% YTD on no fresh company-specific evidence means rerating room is shrinking. Hold the rank with a slight negative drift for valuation/execution risk on a $0.46B name.
verdicts.bull: Leveraged small-cap exposure to HBM/chiplet advanced-packaging capacity build-out.
verdicts.neutral: Sector beta is carrying it; no idiosyncratic catalyst since June 9.
verdicts.bear: 131% YTD on a tiny cap invites a sharp reversal if packaging-capex enthusiasm cools.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Advanced-packaging capacity orders tied to HBM ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Liquidity/valuation discovery risk after a parabolic move
